items.name: Candidate dumps an OPTIONSCONTROLS PPM via screen-switch
items.spec: Extend SILENCER_DUMP_SCREEN to handle 'options_controls' and write a 640x480 P6 PPM at /tmp/sdl3_dump/screen_00.ppm. main_menu / options / options_audio / options_display pathways must remain unchanged.

items.name: Frame panel rendered (bank 7 idx 7, fullscreen bordered overlay)
items.spec: Bank 7 idx 7 fullscreen bordered panel renders correctly on top of the bank-6 idx-0 starfield+planet bg. May require extending the candidate's sprite-bank loader to include bank 7. Pattern fidelity matches reference (same green-bevel border decoration, same interior treatment).

items.name: Six-row form layout (label + B112x33 + BNONE + B112x33 per row)
items.spec: Six rows render at row stride +53. Each row has: keyname overlay (textbank 134, textwidth 10, x=80, y=95+i*53); B112x33 c1 button at (-30, 0+i*53) with anchor formula `top_left = anchor - sprite.offset`; BNONE connector text at (383, 95+i*53, w=40 h=30, textbank 134 textwidth 9); B112x33 c2 button at (120, 0+i*53). Title overlay 'Configure Controls' at top.

items.name: Key labels populated correctly (rows 0..5: Move Up..Aim Up/Right)
items.spec: Row labels and key contents match the reference per docs/design/screen-options-controls.md table: rows 0..3 Move Up/Down/Left/Right with Up/Down/Left/Right key1 + OR connector + empty key2; rows 4..5 Aim Up/Left + Aim Up/Right with Up key1 + AND connector + Left/Right key2.

items.name: Scrollbar widget rendered (right edge, scrollposition=0, thumb at top)
items.spec: Vertical scrollbar at the right edge of the frame interior. Thumb at top (scrollposition=0). May require introducing a scrollbar widget module in the candidate. res_index=9 in the scrollbar bank (per spec).

items.name: Visual equivalence to /tmp/real_optionscontrols_dump.ppm
items.spec: Final gate. Candidate PPM is visually equivalent to /tmp/real_optionscontrols_dump.ppm to a casual reader, modulo aliasing / blend-noise / star-RNG / animation-phase nits (<1% pixel difference acceptable). Save and Cancel buttons rendered at bottom (B196x33 at y=117).
